layout.siteTitle: Fabian Montoya | Full Stack Developer & RPA
layout.siteDescription: Fabian Montoya's Portfolio - Full Stack Developer and RPA Engineer in Nicaragua. Specialized in web technologies and automation.

presentation.tagline: From elegant business websites to information systems with AI integrations.

hero.headline: Let's make your digital project happen
hero.description1: Let's build the website that will boost your business and accompany you in your digital growth. Your new users expect to meet you and you're one step away from achieving it.
promises: Business landing pages, personal portfolios, blogs, news sites and more.
Product sales or service provision systems, inventory, billing and customer management.
AI chatbot integration on your website to improve your users' experience.

experience.title: PROFESSIONAL CAREER
experience.description: Explore my professional experience and see how I have applied my skills in professional environments by optimizing processes, streamlining information management, and improving user experiences.

otherExperience.title: Other experiences
otherExperience.description: Freelance work building and maintaining websites and online stores with WordPress, Shopify, and other CMS platforms, focused on clean content management, responsive layouts, and practical business goals.

items.description: Roca Company Solutions provides management services for the DMV, vehicle insurance, and product sales in the U.S. I worked as the Frontend Developer in charge of designing and developing the Maya management system.
achievements: Completely designed and developed the frontend for the company's DMV case, insurance, and product management system. Stack: React, Vite, React Router, TanStack Query, TanStack Table.
Migrated large volumes of spreadsheet-based information into Maya and optimized its modules to render large datasets with excellent performance.
Implemented data exports to XLSX, PDF, and image files, helping migrate registration, handling, and tracking workflows from spreadsheets into the new system.

items.description: Dentalrobot automates high-volume dental appointment verifications on U.S. insurer websites. I work as a full stack developer supporting frontend and backend web systems, refactoring legacy code, and developing new projects and features.
achievements: Maintain and develop new features for CC (Control Central) in Angular, prioritizing user experience, accessibility, code robustness, scalability, and stability for every company user.
Designed and implemented Formless, an online editor for table- and marker-based forms that reduced DOCX corruption and usage, saved storage, and streamlined editing directly from CC.
Developed the Parallel engine in Python to run multiple RPA robots at the same time, drastically increasing completed verifications in the same timeframe while keeping resource usage minimal.
Developed Rocketbot modules and web scraper robots using advanced data extraction techniques in JavaScript and Python.

projects.title: PROJECTS
projects.description: My projects, tools and information systems that I have developed for clients and for myself, with modern and scalable technologies. Some are being used by thousands of users, others are tools that have helped me improve my productivity and learn new technologies.

items.ferreteria-berrios: Dashboard for managing inventory and billing of a hardware store. Includes charts and sales reports.
items.credit-ayuda: System for registering and tracking financial credits.
items.formless: Editable and customizable form with tables and bookmarks, exportable to docx.
